steps.title: Explain the exception pattern
steps.content: The first sentence says many elements were isolated shortly after discovery, but not all elements followed that pattern. The next sentence must explain what happened in some cases: the isolation process took years.

steps.title: Reject illogical transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast even though the sentence explains the exception already introduced. Choice B signals a result, but no consequence is being drawn. Choice D adds another point without explaining the exception. The answer is C.
